acceptance_criteria.criterion: Adjacency data for all fileIDs persists to graph.dat in a CSR-like compact array format
Reloads correctly after a process restart (write, reopen graph.dat, assert identical adjacency)

test_cases.name: TestCSRFormat
test_cases.purpose: required test spec: write multi-node/multi-edge-type adjacency, reload, assert identical

test_cases.name: TestCSREmptyGraph
test_cases.purpose: edge case: zero nodes/edges round-trips cleanly

test_cases.name: TestCSRCorruptedPayloadDetected
test_cases.purpose: checksum-corruption detection: flipped byte in payload is caught, not silently misread

test_cases.name: TestCSRLargeAdjacency
test_cases.purpose: many nodes/many edges per node - exercises offsets-array math at non-trivial scale

test_cases.name: TestCSRTruncatedHeaderRejected
test_cases.purpose: file shorter than fixed header size is rejected with an error, not a panic

regression_checks: go test ./graph/... -count=1 -timeout 10m clean (includes pre-existing edge_append_test.go - zero regressions)
